channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Landslide in Chongqing leaves eight dead, rescue teams battle heavy rains and unstable terrain
item.description: A devastating landslide struck Pengshui County in southwestern China's Chongqing municipality on Friday morning, killing at least eight people and leaving 34 missing. The disaster occurred when over 1...

item.title: Community efforts to combat overfishing and protect Pacific tuna stocks
item.description: The article details the urgent efforts by Pacific Island communities to combat overfishing and protect tuna stocks amid climate change and unsustainable practices. Local fishermen are using fish aggre...

item.title: England Manager Tuchel Reflects on Semi-Final Tactical Choices
item.description: The article discusses England manager Thomas Tuchel's stance on his decisions during the semi-final match. Tuchel, who has been under scrutiny for his tactical choices, expressed no regrets about his ...

item.title: Suna East MP Urges Ruto to Redirect Gifts to Migori
item.description: Suna East MP Junet Mohamed has called on President William Ruto to extend government giveaways to Migori, following the Ol Kalou by-election where UDA deployed gifts like mattresses and gas cylinders....

item.title: CSS Exam Registrations Drop Over 48% in Four Years, Nominations Remain Low
item.description: Official data from the Federal Public Service Commission (FPSC) reveals a significant decline in registrations for the Central Superior Services (CSS) examination, which is one of Pakistan's most pres...

item.title: Canadian Beef Industry Faces Risks from Mercosur Trade Pact
item.description: The article discusses the potential risks of Canada's free trade agreement with the Mercosur bloc, which includes Brazil, Argentina, Paraguay, and Uruguay. Canadian ranchers warn that the deal could l...

item.title: MEMErimar and Inocencia Participate in 'Laro Laro Pick' on It’s Showtime
item.description: The article discusses the collaboration of MEMErimar and Inocencia in the popular game show 'Laro Laro Pick' featured on It’s Showtime. Published on July 18, 2026, the piece highlights their participa...

item.title: Trump Supporter Urges President to Focus on Iran and the Economy Instead of Revisiting the 2020 Election
item.description: A self-described supporter of President Donald Trump said he would prefer the president to stop revisiting claims about the 2020 election and instead concentrate on current policy issues, according to...

item.title: Kay Kay Menon on Acting Style and Role in 'Adarsh Baal Vidyalaya'
item.description: The article discusses actor Kay Kay Menon's insights into his acting philosophy and role in the Prime Video series 'Adarsh Baal Vidyalaya'. Menon emphasizes that acting requires restraint rather than ...

item.title: DG of NILDS aims to position institute as global democracy hub
item.description: The Director-General of the National Institute for Legislative and Democratic Studies (NILDS), Abubakar Sulaiman, outlined his vision for the institution to become a global intellectual hub for democr...

item.title: London Diamond League preview: Key athletes and event highlights
item.description: The London Diamond League returns on Saturday, 18 July, featuring a star-studded field with British athletes such as Josh Kerr, Keely Hodgkinson, and Dina Asher-Smith. Kerr aims to break the mile worl...

item.title: Kilosa Benefits from Enhanced Health and Governance Systems
item.description: The article highlights how the town of Kilosa in Tanzania is experiencing positive outcomes from upgraded health and governance infrastructure. Improved facilities and streamlined administrative proce...

item.title: Kenyan Man Dies in UK After Rare Cancer Battle; Family Seeks Help to Repatriate Body
item.description: Roy Mujenyi Mugera, a 32-year-old Kenyan from Vihiga County, passed away on July 8, 2026, after a prolonged battle with synovial sarcoma, a rare and aggressive cancer. Despite his illness, Roy activel...

item.title: India-Japan bullet train project progress confirmed with 2027 timeline
item.description: The Ministry of External Affairs clarified that discussions on the Mumbai-Ahmedabad high-speed rail project with Japan are progressing well, with the first section set to open by 2027. A former Japane...

item.title: First Nations in B.C. evaluate nuclear power as potential energy solution
item.description: A group of B.C. First Nations leaders recently visited Ontario to examine small modular reactors (SMRs) as a potential energy source for the province. The delegation, representing the Haisla Nation, M...

item.title: Zawadi Yamungu's Sama Nominations Highlight Indigenous Music's Role in Modern South African Culture
item.description: Zawadi Yamungu, an emerging musician, has received her first Sama nomination for Best African Adult Contemporary Album and three Basadi in Music Awards nominations. The recognition underscores the gro...

item.title: Charlene Holt: A 1960s Hollywood Icon's Enduring Legacy
item.description: Charlene Holt (1928–1996) was an American actress and model celebrated for her elegance and presence in 1960s Hollywood. Born Verna Charlene Stavely in Snyder, Texas, she launched her career as a mode...

item.title: Raiders' Victory Overshadowed by Star's Season-Ending Injury
item.description: The Canberra Raiders secured a hard-fought victory against South Sydney, but the triumph was overshadowed by a devastating season-ending injury to star player Hudson Young. Young suffered an Achilles ...

item.title: Edmonton Elks Secure 19-17 Victory Over B.C. Lions in CFL Matchup
item.description: Vincent Blanchard's four field goals propelled the Edmonton Elks to a 19-17 victory over the B.C. Lions, marking a crucial win in their CFL season. The Elks, who haven't reached the playoffs since 201...

item.title: Spain Adjusts Tactics to Counter Messi in World Cup Final
item.description: Luis de la Fuente, Spain’s coach, revealed the team plans to give Lionel Messi ‘special attention’ in Sunday’s World Cup final against Argentina but will avoid man-marking him. De la Fuente shared a s...
